findings.description:
SmartBillions.commitDividend(address) (SmartBillions.sol#459-478) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- share = balances[_who] * 0xffffffff / totalSupply (SmartBillions.sol#468)
	- balance += share * dividends[last] (SmartBillions.sol#471)

findings.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.13 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.13 (SmartBillions.sol#7)

Version constraint ^0.4.13 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage

	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.13 (SmartBillions.sol#7)

findings.description:
Reentrancy in SmartBillions.playSystem(uint256,address) (SmartBillions.sol#633-664):
	External calls:
	- won() (SmartBillions.sol#634)
		- msg.sender.transfer(_amount) (SmartBillions.sol#372)
		- msg.sender.transfer(maxpay) (SmartBillions.sol#382)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- bets[msg.sender] = Bet({value:uint192(msg.value),betHash:uint32(bethash),blockNum:uint32(hashNext)}) (SmartBillions.sol#659)
	- dividends[dividendPeriod] += msg.value / 20 (SmartBillions.sol#639)
	- hashBetSum = msg.value (SmartBillions.sol#648)
	- hashBetSum = msg.value (SmartBillions.sol#653)
	- hashBetSum += msg.value (SmartBillions.sol#656)
	- putHash() (SmartBillions.sol#662)
		- hashLast = lastb + 10 (SmartBillions.sol#754)
	- hashNext = block.number + 3 (SmartBillions.sol#647)
	- hashNext ++ (SmartBillions.sol#652)
	- putHash() (SmartBillions.sol#662)
		- hashes[delta % hashesSize] = calcHashes(uint32(lastb),uint32(delta)) (SmartBillions.sol#753)
	- walletBalance += fee (SmartBillions.sol#643)
	- wallets[_partner].balance += uint208(fee) (SmartBillions.sol#644)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- LogBet(msg.sender,uint256(bethash),hashNext,msg.value) (SmartBillions.sol#660)

findings.description:
Reentrancy in SmartBillions.invest(address) (SmartBillions.sol#399-431):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(msg.value.sub(investing)) (SmartBillions.sol#407)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] += senderBalance (SmartBillions.sol#423)
	- balances[owner] += ownerBalance (SmartBillions.sol#424)
	- balances[animator] += animatorBalance (SmartBillions.sol#425)
	- totalSupply += senderBalance + ownerBalance + animatorBalance (SmartBillions.sol#426)
	- walletBalance += investing / 10 (SmartBillions.sol#413)
	- walletBalance += (investing * 5 / 100) * 2 (SmartBillions.sol#416)
	- wallets[owner].balance += uint208(investing / 10) (SmartBillions.sol#414)
	- wallets[owner].balance += uint208(investing * 5 / 100) (SmartBillions.sol#417)
	- wallets[_partner].balance += uint208(investing * 5 / 100) (SmartBillions.sol#418)
	- wallets[msg.sender].lastDividendPeriod = uint16(dividendPeriod) (SmartBillions.sol#419)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- LogInvestment(msg.sender,_partner,investing) (SmartBillions.sol#430)
	- Transfer(address(0),msg.sender,senderBalance) (SmartBillions.sol#427)
	- Transfer(address(0),owner,ownerBalance) (SmartBillions.sol#428)
	- Transfer(address(0),animator,animatorBalance) (SmartBillions.sol#429)

		- dividends.push(0) (SmartBillions.sol#346)

		- investStart = 0 (SmartBillions.sol#340)

findings.description:
An assertion violation was triggered.
It is possible to trigger an assertion violation. Note that Solidity assert() statements should only be used to check invariants. Review the transaction trace generated for this issue and either make sure your program logic is correct, or use require() instead of assert() if your goal is to constrain user inputs or enforce preconditions. Remember to validate inputs from both callers (for instance, via passed arguments) and callees (for instance, via return values).

findings.description:
A control flow decision is made based on The block.number environment variable.
The block.number environment variable is used to determine a control flow decision. Note that the values of variables like coinbase, gaslimit, block number and timestamp are predictable and can be manipulated by a malicious miner. Also keep in mind that attackers know hashes of earlier blocks. Don't use any of those environment variables as sources of randomness and be aware that use of these variables introduces a certain level of trust into miners.

raw.description:

raw.title: Dependence on predictable environment variable
